name: misra-web-testing-platform
description: AI-powered SaaS platform for MISRA compliance analysis and UI regression testing

scripts.test:e2e: cd packages/backend && dotenv -e ../../.env.test -- npx playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:headed: cd packages/backend && dotenv -e ../../.env.test -- npx playwright test --headed
scripts.test:e2e:debug: cd packages/backend && dotenv -e ../../.env.test -- npx playwright test --debug
